# Pilot Archive Map

## Purpose

This map preserves useful self-hosted pilot history while removing it from active authority for future projects.

## Retirement Decision

The Project Owner has retired the P0–P3 pilot sequence. Retirement is not phase completion. No P0–P3 task, register, gate, or historical PR may be selected as current template or project authority.

The active successor authority, after its introducing PR merges, is `docs/template/TEMPLATE-CONVERSION-REGISTER.md`.

## Retained History Map

| pilot material | retained location | treatment |
| --- | --- | --- |
| pilot control-policy evolution | Git history and historical pull requests | preserved as implementation history; superseded by generic control policy |
| P0–P2 task and gate history | existing development-harness documents and historical PRs | preserved; excluded from current readiness and catalog calculations |
| Phase 3 register and task definitions | existing development-harness Phase 3 documents and historical PRs | retired pilot work; not completed template work; may not be selected or resumed |
| P3-R01 and its PR history | historical pull request discussion and branch history | preserved as a retired pilot correction attempt; not current authority |
| current retirement decision | `docs/archive/harness-test-pilot/PILOT-RETIREMENT-DECISION.md` | repository-native migration evidence |

## Archive Rules

- Do not delete pilot history merely to simplify the template.
- Do not copy pilot task state into a new project as active authority.
- Use historical material only for traceability, lessons learned, or explicit future owner decisions.
- A future project must bootstrap from its own approved source documents, manifest, roadmap, catalog, and executable horizon.
